caption: A man with short dark hair and a beard sits in a recording studio, wearing a black zip-up jacket over a grey shirt and large black over-ear headphones. He is positioned in front of a silver professional condenser microphone mounted on a black boom arm. The background consists of dark grey acoustic foam panels with a ribbed, rectangular texture. Throughout the sequence, the man remains in a stationary position, facing forward. In the initial frames, he looks straight ahead with a neutral expression. As the sequence progresses, he slightly shifts his gaze toward his right, though his head remains mostly centered. No text or logos are visible in the scene.
